Recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with a unique 150-160 character description
Add JSON-LD script block with Organization or WebPage schema markup

Issue: Title tag is too generic (""Sample Page"")
Recommendation: Use a descriptive, keyword-rich title (50-60 characters) that reflects the page content
Add <link rel="canonical" href="..."> to prevent duplicate content issues
Add og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url meta tags for social sharing
Add twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description meta tags
Add <meta name="robots" content="index, follow"> to explicitly control crawling
Use media attribute, preload, or load CSS asynchronously to prevent render blocking
Add font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during font loading (FOIT)
Add descriptive alt attribute to all images for accessibility and image SEO

Issue: Image missing width and height attributes
Recommendation: Add explicit width and height attributes to prevent Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)
Move script to end of body with defer attribute, or use async loading

Issue: innerHTML usage with user input (XSS risk)
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML to prevent XSS attacks; search engines may flag insecure pages
Add sitemap.xml and reference it in robots.txt for better crawlability
Add <meta name="theme-color" content="#..."> for mobile browser theming

Issue: No page title or meta tags defined
Recommendation: Use Next.js Head component or React Helmet to set title, description, and other meta tags

Issue: No meta description for this page/route
Recommendation: Ensure each route/page has a unique meta description via Head or Helmet component

Issue: No structured data for dashboard content
Recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data appropriate to the page content

Issue: Dynamic content insertion without size reservation causes CLS
Recommendation: Reserve space with min-height or use CSS aspect-ratio to prevent layout shift when items load
Add loading="lazy" to images below the fold to improve initial page load performance

Issue: Image missing explicit width and height
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes to prevent CLS; use CSS aspect-ratio as fallback

Issue: List items rendered without stable key prop
Recommendation: Add unique key prop to mapped elements; while primarily a React concern, it affects rendering performance
Add aria-label to icon-only buttons for screen reader accessibility; improves overall page quality signals

Issue: No semantic heading hierarchy across the app
Recommendation: Ensure h1 is used once per page and heading levels follow a logical h1>h2>h3 order

Issue: No breadcrumb or internal link structure
Recommendation: Add breadcrumb navigation with structured data for better crawl context and SERP display
